name: Creamy Ham and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Uncooked bow tie or rotini pasta (7 oz)
6 oz Turkey ham, sliced thin and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the pasta to desired doneness. Add the frozen peas during the last 6 minutes of cooking time. Then add the ham for the last 1 minute of cooking time. Drain; return the pasta to the pan.
2. In a small bowl with a wire whisk, combine the softened cream cheese and milk. Stir this mixture into the hot cooked pasta mixture over medium-low heat for 1-2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Servings: 4 (1 1/4 cup) servings
Source: Pillsbury Fast and Healthy Magazine, March/April 1993
Each serving contains 3 breads, 1 1/2 proteins, 1 fat.
Per serving: 370 cal.
